content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:11 shows user-facing label "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" for the AI Sort toggle.

Pierre: Apple reviewers flag copy that admits a shipped feature is unstable or experimental, since it suggests the build isn't finished. Here the string is directly visible in Settings UI, not just a code comment, so it counts as store-facing/user-facing copy. Consider rewording to something like "May take a moment to sort large inboxes" that doesn't imply instability, or gate the feature until it's fully reliable.
